nodes.name: q7-rewrite.sql
nodes.summary: Rewrite variant of Nexmark Q7 finding the highest bid across all auctions in the last minute using a reformulated tumble-window join approach.

nodes.name: q7-temporal-filter.drop.sql
nodes.summary: Teardown script that drops the materialized view for the temporal-filter variant of Nexmark Q7.

nodes.name: q7-temporal-filter.sql
nodes.summary: Temporal-filter variant of Nexmark Q7 finding the highest bid per auction in a tumble window, restricted to recent bids to reduce state size.

nodes.name: q7.drop.sql
nodes.summary: Teardown script that drops the materialized view created by the standard Nexmark Q7 query.

nodes.name: q7.sql
nodes.summary: Nexmark Q7 benchmark query finding bids with the highest price in each one-minute tumbling window across all auctions.

nodes.name: q8.drop.sql
nodes.summary: Teardown script that drops the materialized view created by the standard Nexmark Q8 query.

nodes.name: q8.sql
nodes.summary: Nexmark Q8 benchmark query finding people who created an auction within 12 hours of registering, using a join between person and auction tumble windows.

nodes.name: q9-temporal-filter.drop.sql
nodes.summary: Teardown script that drops the materialized view for the temporal-filter variant of Nexmark Q9.

nodes.name: q9-temporal-filter.sql
nodes.summary: Temporal-filter variant of Nexmark Q9 joining auctions with their winning bids and full bid details, restricted to a recent time window.

nodes.name: q9.drop.sql
nodes.summary: Teardown script that drops the materialized view created by the standard Nexmark Q9 query.

nodes.name: q9.sql
nodes.summary: Nexmark Q9 benchmark query joining each auction with its winning bid details, finding the highest bid that beats the auction reserve price.
